message:
fix(service): release hedge pending slot when primary fails before hedge dispatch

When the primary future fails and the hedge service's poll_ready
returns Pending, the HedgeFuture would hold a pending slot indefinitely
while returning Poll::Pending — a liveness bug that wastes hedge
capacity and makes the caller hang until timeout/cancellation.

Root cause: the check at line 566 only terminated when slot_held was
false. When slot_held was true (slot acquired but hedge not yet
dispatched), the future would keep retrying poll_ready without ever
releasing the slot or returning the primary error.

Fix: when primary is gone and no hedge future is in flight, release
any held slot immediately and return the primary error. The hedge was
meant as a speculative backup; if it can't even start, holding the
slot is wasteful.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
